notes: Map (/map): Leaflet OSM with Combined (network) vs Direct (feeders) like ADS-B merged/tar1090 split. Combined uses VESSELS_JSON_URL via /api/aircraft.json; Direct uses DIRECT_VESSELS_JSON_URL (default ais-core) via /api/vessels-direct.json. Orange markers for network source tags; SITE_LAT/SITE_LON for default center.

Fix dashboard auto-update (docker:cli exit 1): INSTALL_DIR was /app so Docker bind-mounted the host /app instead of the real install tree. Compose now uses INSTALL_DIR from .env (default /opt/taknet-ais-aggregator) for dashboard mounts (.env, var, VERSION, RELEASES) like ADS-B; docker.sock rw. Update script installs git in docker:cli if missing, quotes paths, and compose pull no longer fails the whole run. Abort update early with a clear message if INSTALL_DIR is still /app.

AIS Friends API v1 (bidirectional): AISFRIENDS_API_V1_ENABLED, AISFRIENDS_API_KEY, optional AISFRIENDS_API_BASE_URL and AISFRIENDS_STATION_ID in Services and /api/settings/network_feeds. Remote source aisfriends for stats, outputs, CoT. Docs link https://www.aisfriends.com/docs/api/v1; compose stub taknet-aisfriends-connector; restart hook updated. Clarifies UDP path remains AISFRIENDS_UDP_PORT in shipfeeder.

aiscatcher.org exchange: AISCATCHER_SHAREDATA, AISCATCHER_FEEDER_KEY, AISCATCHER_SHAREKEY in Config → Services and /api/settings/network_feeds (aligned with docker-shipfeeder env names). Remote source detection includes aiscatcher for stats, outputs, and CoT. Commented compose stub for taknet-aiscatcher-connector; restart hook includes that container name when present.

Web update (Config → Updates): match ADS-B flow — clone, copy to INSTALL_DIR, docker compose pull, explicit build of dashboard + ais-proxy + ais-core, PRE_RESTART + up -d. Fixes compose build failing on non-existent api/nginx services. Updates page SSH hint uses taknet-ais update.

Services: replace ADSBHub with network feeds (AIShub/AISstream). New API /api/settings/network_feeds and status key network_feeds; NETWORK_FEED_* env vars; output/CoT filtering uses shared remote-source detection.
Initial AIS stack; dashboard parity with TAKNET-PS Aggregator web UI.
